tests.test_name: Testing layer selector renders on the Analyze page
tests.description: Verifies that the testing layer selector is visible to users when they arrive on the Analyze page.

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the testing layer selector is visible
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The testing layer selector is present and visible on the Analyze page

tests.test_name: Selecting a layer shows it in the dropdown summary
tests.description: Verifies that when a user selects a testing layer, the selection is reflected in the dropdown summary display.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I select testing layer "Unit"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User can select a predefined testing layer

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the testing layer selector shows "Unit"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The selected layer name appears in the dropdown summary

tests.test_name: Selected testing layers appear in the analysis metadata
tests.description: Verifies that a testing layer selected by the user is recorded in the JSON output metadata produced by the analysis.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I select testing layer "Unit"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User selects a testing layer before running analysis

test_coverage.verification_step: And the JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded JSON output is complete with no missing or placeholder values

test_coverage.verification_step: And the JSON shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer "unit"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The selected testing layer is correctly captured in the analysis output metadata

tests.test_name: Entering a custom layer via Other shows it in the dropdown summary
tests.description: Verifies that a custom testing layer name typed by the user appears in the dropdown summary.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I enter custom testing layer "smoke-only"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User can type a custom testing layer name using the Other option

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the testing layer selector shows "smoke-only"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The custom layer name is displayed in the dropdown summary

tests.test_name: Typing more than 50 characters in Other shows an error
tests.description: Verifies that the application shows an error when a user types a custom testing layer name exceeding the 50-character limit.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I type a 51-character string into the Other layer input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User enters a custom layer name that exceeds the allowed character limit

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the testing layer shows an over-limit error
test_coverage.what_it_checks: An error message is displayed indicating the input is too long

tests.test_name: Selecting 4 or more layers falls back silently and analysis still runs
tests.description: Verifies that selecting four or more testing layers does not break the analysis and output is still produced without disrupting the user experience.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I select testing layers Unit, Integration, API / Contract, and UI / Component
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User selects four or more testing layers simultaneously

test_coverage.verification_step: Then I see documentation in the output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Analysis completes successfully and results are shown despite the high number of layers selected

tests.test_name: A custom layer entered via Other appears in the analysis metadata
tests.description: Verifies that a custom testing layer name entered by the user is correctly included in the JSON analysis output metadata.

test_coverage.verification_step: And I enter custom testing layer "smoke-layer"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User provides a custom testing layer name before running analysis

test_coverage.verification_step: And the JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded JSON output is complete with no missing or placeholder values

test_coverage.verification_step: And the JSON shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer "smoke-layer"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The custom testing layer name is correctly saved in the analysis output metadata

tests.test_name: Error below trigger persists after dropdown is closed with 51+ char Other text
tests.description: Verifies that the character-limit error for a custom testing layer remains visible even after the user closes the dropdown.

test_coverage.verification_step: When I type a 51-character string into the Other layer input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User enters a custom layer name exceeding the character limit

test_coverage.verification_step: And I close the testing layer dropdown
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User closes the dropdown after triggering the error

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the collapsed layer error is visible below the trigger
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The error message persists and remains visible in the collapsed state

tests.test_name: Analyze button is disabled while Other text exceeds 50 characters
tests.description: Verifies that users cannot run analysis when a custom testing layer name exceeds the 50-character limit, preventing invalid submissions.

test_coverage.verification_step: And I type a 51-character string into the Other layer input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User enters an over-limit custom layer name with a file already uploaded

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the Analyze button is disabled
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Analyze button is blocked from submission while the input error exists

tests.test_name: Analyze button re-enables once the Other text error is fixed
tests.description: Verifies that the Analyze button becomes available again once the user corrects a custom testing layer name that was over the character limit.

test_coverage.verification_step: And I type a 51-character string into the Other layer input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User enters an over-limit custom layer name, disabling the Analyze button

test_coverage.verification_step: And I delete one character from the Other layer input
test_coverage.what_it_checks: User corrects the input by reducing it to within the allowed limit

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the Analyze button is enabled
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Analyze button becomes active again once the error is resolved
